description: Renders one static KPI card with a label, value, optional hint, and optional trend.
uiDescription: Shows a large numeric or short textual value with a compact trend pill and a supporting hint line.
generationNotes: Keep value short and prominent, such as a percent, count, time, or amount.
Use trend only when there is an obvious directional meaning.
useCases: Metrics, KPIs, outcomes, business highlights, and summary stats.
Avoid using it for long explanations or large nested bullet lists.
